calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-14-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patrick Heard. Saul M. Ferster, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff and defendant Sylvia Smothers appeared in pro per. Also, present, Michelle L. Horneff, Property Manager. The case settled per stipulation of the parties on the record.

MOTION Notice Of Motion To Strike To Complaint;
Off Calendar Nov-12-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANTs MARIA PEREZ and Sylvia Smothers' MOTION To Strike To Complaint -- granted, no opposition filed. (JJM/301) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR 7855
